Deploy the script below as a Web App (De: Deploy the script below as a Web App (Deploy → New deployment → Web app; Execute as = Me; Who has access = Anyone). Paste the resulting /exec URL here. GmailApp sends from the deploying Google account — no SMTP server needed.

ID of a saved template (Settings → Maile: ID of a saved template (Settings → Mailer → Templates). Leave empty to use the Subject/Content below.

One or more recipients, comma-separated. Supports variables.

Reusable email templates with field-vari: Reusable email templates with field-variable insertion and formatting helpers (formatDate, formatNumber, docso, …).
Secrets (Apps Script URL, SMTP password,: Secrets (Apps Script URL, SMTP password, shared token) are stored server-side and never sent back to the browser.
Send an email via the Mailer plugin back: Send an email via the Mailer plugin backend (Google Apps Script or SMTP), using a saved template or inline content. Recipients and variables can come from upstream nodes.

Used only when no Template id is set. Su: Used only when no Template id is set. Supports field tokens + variables.

No templates yet — create one in Setting: No templates yet — create one in Settings → Mailer → Templates, or use Inline.
Per-node override of the global backend. Credentials (Apps Script URL / SMTP host & password) are set once in Settings → Mailer → Backend — NOT here. "Use configured backend" sends via whatever is set globally; picking Google Apps Script or SMTP forces that backend for this node (still using its globally-configured credentials). If the forced backend has no credentials, the send fails with a clear error.
Pick a managed template by name (Setting: Pick a managed template by name (Settings → Mailer → Templates). Choose "Inline (no template)" to write the Subject/Content below.
Pick relations to load so their fields r: Pick relations to load so their fields resolve in the template (e.g. customer, items.product).
Reusable email templates with a visual e: Reusable email templates with a visual editor, variable insertion and a live preview bound to a sample record.
You have changes that are not saved. Clo: You have changes that are not saved. Closing will lose them.
Deleting the default — another method be: Deleting the default — another method becomes default
No sending methods yet — add one.
Define one or more sending methods. The: Define one or more sending methods. The Send email action and workflow node pick a method (or use the default).
A variable resolving to an attachment fi: A variable resolving to an attachment field value (or array of attachment ids) — e.g. the trigger record's file field.
Which named sending method to use. Leave: Which named sending method to use. Leave "Default method" to use whichever is marked default. Credentials are configured once in Settings → Mailer → Sending methods — NOT here.
